name: Garbage collector
description: The instance's housekeeping durable object — ships on every instance and runs every gc_interval to sweep expired durable objects and prune old pipeline runs. EXTEND IT: open it in the editor and append your own cleanup steps (e.g. a shell step that deletes stale files in the run sandbox: `find {run_directory}/.. -type f -mmin +1440 -delete`). Scheduling is managed for you, so any steps you add just run on the same cadence.
